# salt-theme-gen — AI assistant reference
# https://learn.esalt.net/llms.txt
# Version: 1.2.2
# Last updated: 2026-06-13

## Package

name: salt-theme-gen
npm: npm install salt-theme-gen
license: MIT
dependencies: zero
platforms: Node.js 18+, browser (ESM), Deno, Bun
TypeScript: full types included

## Core API

### generateTheme(options) → GeneratedTheme

The primary function. Call once at app startup.

```ts
import { generateTheme } from 'salt-theme-gen';

// From a preset name:
const theme = generateTheme({
  preset:   'ocean',    // see PRESETS for all 20 names
  spacing:  'default', // 'compact' | 'default' | 'relaxed' | 'spacious'
  radius:   'default', // 'sharp' | 'default' | 'rounded' | 'pill'
  fontSize: 'default', // 'small' | 'default' | 'large' | 'editorial'
});

// From a hex color:
const theme = generateTheme({
  primary: '#6366f1', // any valid hex — use instead of preset
});
```

Returns `GeneratedTheme`:
```ts
interface GeneratedTheme {
  light: GeneratedThemeMode;
  dark:  GeneratedThemeMode;
}
```

### GeneratedThemeMode shape

```ts
interface GeneratedThemeMode {
  mode: 'light' | 'dark';
  colors: {
    // Brand accent colors
    primary:     string;  // hex
    secondary:   string;
    tertiary:    string;
    quaternary:  string;
    // On-colors (foreground on intent backgrounds — WCAG AA guaranteed)
    onPrimary:   string;
    onSecondary: string;
    onTertiary:  string;
    onQuaternary:string;
    onDanger:    string;
    onSuccess:   string;
    onWarning:   string;
    onInfo:      string;
    // Neutral / utility
    background:  string;
    surface:     string;
    text:        string;
    muted:       string;
    border:      string;
    // Semantic intent colors
    danger:      string;
    success:     string;
    warning:     string;
    info:        string;
  };
  states: {
    // 8 intents × 4 states = 32 state tokens
    primary:    { hover: string; pressed: string; focused: string; disabled: string; };
    secondary:  { hover: string; pressed: string; focused: string; disabled: string; };
    tertiary:   { hover: string; pressed: string; focused: string; disabled: string; };
    quaternary: { hover: string; pressed: string; focused: string; disabled: string; };
    danger:     { hover: string; pressed: string; focused: string; disabled: string; };
    success:    { hover: string; pressed: string; focused: string; disabled: string; };
    warning:    { hover: string; pressed: string; focused: string; disabled: string; };
    info:       { hover: string; pressed: string; focused: string; disabled: string; };
  };
  surfaceElevation: {
    card:    string;  // card/sheet background
    elevated:string;  // floating panels, bottom sheets
    modal:   string;  // modals, dialogs
    popover: string;  // tooltips, dropdowns, menus
  };
  spacing: {
    none: number; // always 0
    xs:   number; // default: 4
    sm:   number; //          8
    md:   number; //          12
    lg:   number; //          16
    xl:   number; //          24
    xxl:  number; //          32
  };
  radius: {
    none: number; // always 0
    sm:   number; // default: 6
    md:   number; //          10
    lg:   number; //          14
    xl:   number; //          20
    xxl:  number; //          24
    pill: number; //          999
  };
  fontSizes: {
    xs:    number; // default: 12
    sm:    number; //          14
    md:    number; //          16
    lg:    number; //          18
    xl:    number; //          20
    xxl:   number; //          24
    '3xl': number; //          32
  };
  fontLevel: number; // 8–18 (for react-native-salt)
  accessibility: {
    // WCAG 2.1 contrast ratio. Each entry: { ratio: number; level: "AAA" | "AA" | "fail" }
    primaryOnBackground:      { ratio: number; level: 'AAA' | 'AA' | 'fail'; };
    secondaryOnBackground:    { ratio: number; level: 'AAA' | 'AA' | 'fail'; };
    tertiaryOnBackground:     { ratio: number; level: 'AAA' | 'AA' | 'fail'; };
    quaternaryOnBackground:   { ratio: number; level: 'AAA' | 'AA' | 'fail'; };
    textOnBackground:         { ratio: number; level: 'AAA' | 'AA' | 'fail'; };
    textOnSurface:            { ratio: number; level: 'AAA' | 'AA' | 'fail'; };
    dangerOnBackground:       { ratio: number; level: 'AAA' | 'AA' | 'fail'; };
    successOnBackground:      { ratio: number; level: 'AAA' | 'AA' | 'fail'; };
    warningOnBackground:      { ratio: number; level: 'AAA' | 'AA' | 'fail'; };
    infoOnBackground:         { ratio: number; level: 'AAA' | 'AA' | 'fail'; };
    onPrimaryOnPrimary:       { ratio: number; level: 'AAA' | 'AA' | 'fail'; };
    onSecondaryOnSecondary:   { ratio: number; level: 'AAA' | 'AA' | 'fail'; };
    onTertiaryOnTertiary:     { ratio: number; level: 'AAA' | 'AA' | 'fail'; };
    onQuaternaryOnQuaternary: { ratio: number; level: 'AAA' | 'AA' | 'fail'; };
    onDangerOnDanger:         { ratio: number; level: 'AAA' | 'AA' | 'fail'; };
    onSuccessOnSuccess:       { ratio: number; level: 'AAA' | 'AA' | 'fail'; };
    onWarningOnWarning:       { ratio: number; level: 'AAA' | 'AA' | 'fail'; };
    onInfoOnInfo:             { ratio: number; level: 'AAA' | 'AA' | 'fail'; };
  };
}
```

### adjustTheme(theme, overrides) → GeneratedTheme

Apply partial overrides to an existing theme. Automatically regenerates derived tokens (onColors, states, accessibility) when base colors change.

```ts
import { adjustTheme } from 'salt-theme-gen';

const adjusted = adjustTheme(theme, {
  light: { colors: { primary: '#6366f1' }, spacing: { md: 14 } },
  dark:  { colors: { primary: '#818cf8' } },
  both:  { spacing: { md: 14 } },  // both: applies to both modes; mode keys win per field
});
```

### diffTheme(a, b) → ThemeDiff

Compare two themes. Returns changed tokens only.

```ts
import { diffTheme } from 'salt-theme-gen';

const diff = diffTheme(themeA, themeB);
// diff.identical — true if no changes
// diff.light.colors?.primary → { old: '...', new: '...' }
// FieldChange<T> = { old: T; new: T }
```

### parseThemeJSON(json) → GeneratedTheme

Runtime validation. Throws an Error on invalid input.

```ts
import { parseThemeJSON } from 'salt-theme-gen';

try {
  const theme = parseThemeJSON(unknownData); // GeneratedTheme
} catch (err) {
  console.error(err.message); // descriptive validation error
}
```

### contrastRatio(colorA, colorB) → number

Calculate WCAG contrast ratio between two hex colors. Returns a number (1–21).

```ts
import { contrastRatio } from 'salt-theme-gen';

const ratio = contrastRatio(theme.light.colors.primary, theme.light.colors.background);
console.log(ratio);       // e.g. 4.82
console.log(ratio >= 4.5); // true → passes WCAG AA
console.log(ratio >= 7.0); // false → doesn't reach AAA
```

## TypeScript types

All types are exported from 'salt-theme-gen':

```ts
import type {
  GeneratedTheme,
  GeneratedThemeMode,
  GenerateThemeOptions,  // input options for generateTheme()
  SemanticColors,
  IntentStates,
  StateColors,
  SurfaceElevation,
  AccessibilityReport,
  ContrastEntry,         // { ratio: number; level: "AAA" | "AA" | "fail" }
  SpacingScale,
  RadiusScale,
  FontSizeScale,
  ThemePreset,           // union of all 20 preset names
  ColorHarmony,          // 'analogous' | 'complementary' | 'triadic' | 'split-complementary' | 'tetradic' | 'monochromatic'
  SpacingPreset,         // 'compact' | 'default' | 'relaxed' | 'spacious'
  RadiusPreset,          // 'sharp' | 'default' | 'rounded' | 'pill'
  FontSizePreset,        // 'small' | 'default' | 'large' | 'editorial'
  ThemeOverrides,        // input for adjustTheme()
  ThemeModeOverrides,
  ThemeDiff,
  ThemeModeDiff,
  FieldChange,           // { old: T; new: T }
} from 'salt-theme-gen';
```

## PRESETS

20 built-in nature-inspired presets. Pass as `preset` in generateTheme().

| Preset         | Hue  | Character                     |
|----------------|------|-------------------------------|
| peacock        | 175  | Teal-green, vibrant           |
| ocean          | 235  | Deep sea blue, professional   |
| forest         | 145  | Green canopy, earthy          |
| sunset         | 45   | Warm orange sky               |
| cherry-blossom | 350  | Pink petals, delicate         |
| arctic         | 230  | Cool ice blue, minimal        |
| desert         | 60   | Sandy terracotta, refined     |
| lavender       | 300  | Purple flower fields, calm    |
| emerald        | 155  | Deep green gemstone           |
| coral-reef     | 25   | Warm coral pink               |
| midnight       | 260  | Deep navy, developer tool     |
| autumn         | 50   | Burnt orange leaves           |
| rose-gold      | 15   | Soft metallic pink, premium   |
| sapphire       | 255  | Rich blue gem, authority      |
| mint           | 165  | Fresh cool green              |
| volcano        | 30   | Fiery red-orange, intense     |
| twilight       | 290  | Dusk purple, modern           |
| honey          | 70   | Golden amber, warm            |
| storm          | 245  | Gray-blue thundercloud        |
| aurora         | 155  | Northern lights, futuristic   |

Custom: use `primary` option for hex colors — `generateTheme({ primary: '#6366f1' })`

## SCALE OPTIONS

### spacing (SpacingPreset)
- compact:  none:0 xs:2  sm:4  md:8  lg:12 xl:16 xxl:24
- default:  none:0 xs:4  sm:8  md:12 lg:16 xl:24 xxl:32
- relaxed:  none:0 xs:6  sm:12 md:16 lg:20 xl:32 xxl:40
- spacious: none:0 xs:8  sm:16 md:20 lg:28 xl:40 xxl:52

### radius (RadiusPreset)
- sharp:    none:0 sm:2  md:4  lg:6  xl:8  xxl:10 pill:0
- default:  none:0 sm:6  md:10 lg:14 xl:20 xxl:24 pill:999
- rounded:  none:0 sm:10 md:14 lg:18 xl:24 xxl:30 pill:999
- pill:     none:0 sm:14 md:18 lg:24 xl:30 xxl:40 pill:999

### fontSize (FontSizePreset)
- small:     xs:10 sm:12 md:14 lg:16 xl:20 xxl:26 3xl:32
- default:   xs:12 sm:14 md:16 lg:18 xl:20 xxl:24 3xl:32
- large:     xs:14 sm:16 md:18 lg:24 xl:28 xxl:36 3xl:44
- editorial: xs:14 sm:16 md:20 lg:28 xl:36 xxl:48 3xl:56

## CSS VARIABLE NAMING CONVENTION

When converting GeneratedThemeMode to CSS custom properties, use this naming:

```
colors.primary        → --color-primary
colors.onPrimary      → --color-on-primary   (camelCase → kebab-case)
colors.background     → --color-background
colors.surface        → --color-surface
colors.text           → --color-text
colors.muted          → --color-muted
colors.border         → --color-border
colors.danger         → --color-danger
colors.success        → --color-success
colors.warning        → --color-warning
colors.info           → --color-info

surfaceElevation.card     → --surface-card
surfaceElevation.elevated → --surface-elevated
surfaceElevation.modal    → --surface-modal
surfaceElevation.popover  → --surface-popover

spacing.md            → --space-md            (not --spacing-md)
radius.md             → --radius-md
fontSizes.md          → --text-md             (not --font-md or --fontsize-md)

states.primary.hover  → --state-primary-hover
states.danger.focused → --state-danger-focused
```

camelCase → kebab-case conversion: replace /([A-Z])/g with '-$1' then toLowerCase()

## STANDARD INJECTION PATTERN (web)

```ts
function kebab(str: string): string {
  return str.replace(/([A-Z])/g, '-$1').toLowerCase();
}

function modeToVars(mode: GeneratedThemeMode): string {
  const lines: string[] = [];
  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(mode.colors))
    lines.push(`  --color-${kebab(k)}: ${v};`);
  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(mode.surfaceElevation))
    lines.push(`  --surface-${k}: ${v};`);
  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(mode.spacing))
    lines.push(`  --space-${k}: ${v}px;`);
  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(mode.radius))
    lines.push(`  --radius-${k}: ${v}px;`);
  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(mode.fontSizes))
    lines.push(`  --text-${k}: ${v}px;`);
  for (const [intent, states] of Object.entries(mode.states))
    for (const [state, val] of Object.entries(states as Record<string, string>))
      lines.push(`  --state-${intent}-${state}: ${val};`);
  return lines.join('\n');
}

const css = `
:root {
${modeToVars(theme.light)}
}
:root[data-theme="dark"] {
${modeToVars(theme.dark)}
}
@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
  :root:not([data-theme="light"]) {
${modeToVars(theme.dark).split('\n').map(l => '  ' + l).join('\n')}
  }
}
`;
```

## DARK MODE PATTERN

```html
<!-- Synchronous inline script — prevents FOUC. Must run before CSS. -->
<script>
  (function() {
    var t = localStorage.getItem('theme');
    if (t) document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', t);
  })();
</script>
```

```js
// Toggle
function toggleDark() {
  var html = document.documentElement;
  var next = html.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark';
  html.setAttribute('data-theme', next);
  localStorage.setItem('theme', next);
}
```

## REACT NATIVE NOTE

React Native does not support CSS custom properties.
Use GeneratedThemeMode JS objects directly:

```tsx
const { mode } = useTheme(); // GeneratedThemeMode
const styles = useMemo(() => StyleSheet.create({
  container: { backgroundColor: mode.colors.background },
  text:       { color: mode.colors.text, fontSize: mode.fontSizes.md },
  btn:        { backgroundColor: mode.colors.primary,
                borderRadius: mode.radius.md,
                padding: mode.spacing.md },
}), [mode]);
```

Always wrap StyleSheet.create in useMemo([mode]) to avoid recreation on every render.

## ACCESSIBILITY

theme.light.accessibility contains 18 WCAG 2.1 contrast ratio checks.
Each entry: `{ ratio: number; level: "AAA" | "AA" | "fail" }`
All checks pass AA by default. If any fail, the package auto-corrects and warns.

```ts
const { accessibility } = theme.light;

// Check all AA
const allAA = Object.values(accessibility).every(c => c.level !== 'fail');
// true for all built-in presets

// Check specific pair
console.log(accessibility.primaryOnBackground);
// { ratio: 4.51, level: 'AA' }

// Use contrastRatio() for custom pairs not in the report
import { contrastRatio } from 'salt-theme-gen';
const ratio = contrastRatio(theme.light.colors.primary, theme.light.colors.surface);
// number (1–21)
```

The 18 checks: primaryOnBackground, secondaryOnBackground, tertiaryOnBackground, quaternaryOnBackground, textOnBackground, textOnSurface, dangerOnBackground, successOnBackground, warningOnBackground, infoOnBackground, onPrimaryOnPrimary, onSecondaryOnSecondary, onTertiaryOnTertiary, onQuaternaryOnQuaternary, onDangerOnDanger, onSuccessOnSuccess, onWarningOnWarning, onInfoOnInfo

## RELATED PACKAGES

- @esaltws/react-native-salt — component library for React Native, uses GeneratedThemeMode
- SaltProvider from @esaltws/react-native-salt — pass mode prop, all components inherit tokens
